name: happy2
description: Happy (2) desktop web app and server bundle

scripts.build: pnpm -r --if-present build && VITE_HAPPY2_SERVER_URL='/' pnpm --filter happy2-web exec vite build --outDir ../happy2-server/dist/web --emptyOutDir false
scripts.test:non-server: pnpm --parallel --filter happy2-state --filter happy2-ui --filter happy2-app test && pnpm --dir packages/happy2-gym test:playwright
scripts.coverage:server: pnpm test:coverage-tooling && pnpm coverage:server:unit && pnpm coverage:server:gym && tsx packages/happy2-server/tooling/server-coverage/cli.ts check
scripts.coverage:server:baseline: pnpm test:coverage-tooling && pnpm coverage:server:unit && pnpm coverage:server:gym && tsx packages/happy2-server/tooling/server-coverage/cli.ts baseline
scripts.format: oxfmt --write eslint scripts tsconfig.json && pnpm -r --if-present format
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check eslint scripts tsconfig.json && pnpm -r --if-present format:check
scripts.check:validation: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm --dir packages/happy2-server architecture:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage-tooling && pnpm test:non-server && pnpm coverage:server:unit && pnpm coverage:server:gym
scripts.check: pnpm check:validation && tsx packages/happy2-server/tooling/server-coverage/cli.ts check && pnpm build
